headline: Correction: UBS Maintains Buy on Live Nation Entertainment, Raises Price Target to $208
summary: Correction: UBS analyst Batya Levi maintains Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE:LYV) with a Buy and raises the price target from $181 to $208.
